prose: Frontier-orbital energies for aniline (C₆H₅NH₂, 14 atoms) were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (chemkit tier 'standard', density-fitted) in PySCF. The calculation was a single-point energy evaluation on the user-supplied XYZ geometry, in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1 (neutral, closed-shell singlet). The SCF converged cleanly in 9 cycles. The HOMO energy is −5.553772 eV (index 24, occupied), the LUMO energy is −0.2489544 eV (index 25, unoccupied), and the headline HOMO–LUMO gap is 5.3048177 eV. Koopmans-derived descriptors: vertical IP = 5.5538 eV, vertical EA = 0.2490 eV, electronegativity = 2.9014 eV, chemical hardness = 2.6524 eV, softness = 0.37702 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.5868 eV. Total electronic energy = −287.71578 Hartree. Integrity status: trustworthy = true (all checks passed). No warnings were reported by the engine.
